TABLE Sl. No. Class of Motor Vehicles Maximum speed per hour in Kilometers (1) (2) (3) 1. 2. 3. 4. 5. 6. Motor vehicles used for carriage of passengers comprising nine or more seats in addition to the driver’s seat Motor vehicles used for carriage of passengers comprising not more than eight seats in addition to the driver’s seat Motor vehicles used for carriage of goods Quadricycle Three wheeled vehicles Motor cycles 80 100 80 70 60 80 [F. No. RT-11036/45/2006-MVL] SANJAY BANDOPADHYAYA, Jt. Secy.
